autopaste_text:
TO: Maker@Betsy
FROM: TinkerDen@Betsy

MISSION: Add more recommendation metrics before decisions.

OBJECTIVE:
The current visible sub-scores are enough for a V0 command choice; extra scoring now risks AI hope and dashboard bloat.

PACKET:
packet_id: td_packet_autopaste_ready_mqrfbula_0i4aok
operator_selection: KEEP
recommendation: KILL
composite_score: 28
return_destination: TinkerDen Intake
receipt_required: Y

TASK:
There is pressure to make the chooser feel smarter.

WORKSPACE TARGET:
Maker@Betsy PowerToys Workspaces Launcher (configured)

RETURN:
Receipt to TinkerDen Intake / Speaker. Include packet_id and proof path.

RULES:
- No account automation.
- No unauthorized auto-send.
- No browser credential control.
- No fake delivery.
- Clipboard + workspace focus only in V0.
- Operator must paste/send manually.
guardrails: Clipboard + workspace focus only in V0.
